items.title: 7's House Latte
items.description: Double espresso pulled from single-estate Uva beans, steamed milk, finished with a leaf of latte art.

items.title: Hill Country Love Cake
items.description: Cashews, semolina and rosewater, baked slow the traditional way and cut generously for the road ahead.

items.title: Spiced Fish Cutlet Snack Box
items.description: Four crisp fish cutlets, a wedge of lime and house chili sauce — built to eat with one hand at a rest stop.

items.title: Uva Cardamom Espresso
items.description: A rich double-espresso shot flavored with freshly crushed green cardamom pods harvested from hill-country gardens.

items.title: Spiced Honey Roll Cake
items.description: Soft sponge cake rolled with raw forest honey and locally sourced Sri Lankan cinnamon filling.

items.title: Bandarawela Vegetable Samosas
items.description: Three crispy pastries stuffed with spiced mountain potatoes, green peas, and local herbs, served hot.
